# Missing parent note

## Definition

An unparented atomic note has a focused idea but no link to a structure note
that explains where the idea belongs.

## Analogy

It is like a labeled folder left on a desk instead of filed in a cabinet.

## Example

This note defines a review concern and gives a concrete example, but it omits
any structure-note parent link.

## Sources

- Synthetic fixture handbook, 2026.
